description_text: 23'' Car Suv Gloss Black Lower Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser ABS 5 Shark Fins Spoiler Description Features: Universal Lower Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit PU Spoiler Black 5 Fin. Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Universal custom fitment; Professional installation is required. Specifications: Material: ABS Plastic Color:Gloss Black Dimension: 23" x6" (inches) Top Length: 23 Inches Lower Length: 21 Inches Height: 6 Inches Fin Height: 2 Inches Fitment Type: Performance/Custom Surface Finish:Gloss Black Placement on Vehicle: Rear Package Included: 1x Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit (adhesive tape are included) Notice: - Please allow 1-3CM differs due to manual measurement. - Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your understanding. Payment 1.We accept Payoneer、PayPal、Mastercard、VISA etc. 2.All major credit cards are accepted through secure payment processor. 3.For faster service, please update your correct address before sending payment. Shipping Item will be shipped within 24 hours upon receipt of payment, excluding weekends and public holidays. If to USA,we will ship it by USPS,it will take about 7-10 working days to you，and you can track it on line. If to other country,we will ship it by China Post or Singapore Air Mail, it will take about 10-28 working days to you; Delivery time is about 14-28 business days and it may take up to 8 weeks to some European countries and South American countries due to strict custom inspection. We ship worldwide. Shipping fee include packing, warehouse , distribution, order handling and processing costs. Please note that some countries will have custom duty or tax for certain items. It is the buyer's responsibility to pay all endued custom duty or tax. We are not responsible for any custom duty or tax since our price do not include this charge. Terms of Sale 30-day Warranty with Exchange for defective, malfunctioned, incorrect or parts-missing items. Please notify us and simply return the item with all parts and accessories packed and marked "FOR EXCHANGE" within 30 days of receipt. If defective, malfunctioned or parts-missing items are no longer available, a refund may be issued. Refunds are not generally issued. Special situations are examined on a case to case basis. In most circumstances, Shipping and Handling fee is non-refundable. About Us Please contact us through eBay link if you have any questions. We will reply you within 24 hours. Please check you spam mail if no response for 24 hours. excluding weekends and public holidays. Contact Us Positive feedback will be automatically left to all buyers once they have paid the item or the payment transaction is completed. We highly appreciate that you can contact with us before you leaving Negative feedback or Neutral feedback. It is because leaving Negative feedback or Neutral Feedback is never a good way to resolve problem. We will offer proper arrangement and help to resolve any problem as soon as possible.
